name: ios-code-review
description: Comprehensive iOS / iPadOS / watchOS / tvOS / visionOS code review. Two dispatch modes: STANDARD — a single session-model agent (no model pin; always the strongest available Claude) that simulates BOTH the Apple App Review team AND a senior Apple platform engineer, including a real-simulator verification pass via XcodeBuildMCP when available. TEAM (triggered by the exact phrase 'ios team review' or `--team`) — the orchestrator acts as team lead per the ios-team-lead manual: maps the codebase, partitions it into 4-10 non-overlapping scopes, dispatches `senior-ios-reviewer` sub-agents in one parallel wave, adds a runtime-verification agent and a mandatory seam review, then consolidates findings into one unified report with normalized verdicts. Reviews 12 dimensions across 4 tiers (App Store rejection risk, privacy, entitlements, security, HIG, accessibility, SwiftUI/UIKit patterns, deep linking & extensions, Swift quality, concurrency safety, performance & memory, platform integration). Returns evidence-tagged findings ([R] rejection / [R?] likely / [W] warning / [~] recommendation / [+] praise) with independent submission and engineering verdicts. Optional local knowledge-base support.
